headline: Can Samsara Sustain its Margin Expansion Momentum in Fiscal 2027?
summary: IOT's fiscal 2027 outlook points to continued margin gains as enterprise adoption, AI expansion and multi-product deals drive operating leverage.

headline: Verizon (VZ), AT&T, and T-Mobile Form A Joint Venture to End Mobile Dead Zones Across the US
summary: Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ) is one of the Most Undervalued US Stocks According to Hedge Funds. On May 14, Reuters reported that Verizon Communications Inc. (NYSE:VZ), along with AT&T and T-Mobile, has agreed in principle to form a joint venture aimed at eliminating mobile dead zones across the United States, particularly in rural areas. ​The […]

headline: The Dividend Stocks That Can Replace a $65,000 Income and What They’ll Cost You
summary: Replacing a real paycheck with dividends is the cleanest version of financial independence. The income target here is $65,000 per year, roughly the US median individual wage, and the question is whether a $650,000 portfolio can actually produce it. The honest answer up front: only by reaching past pure blue chips into higher-yield categories. Here ... The Dividend Stocks That Can Replace a $65,000 Income and What They’ll Cost You

headline: Our $100,000 Blue-Chip Value Portfolio Pays $6,500 per Year and Offers Boomers Big Passive Income
summary: Blue-chip stocks are shares of large, well-established, financially stable companies with a consistent and reliable performance history. They are often considered less risky and are a popular choice for long-term investors. Nearly all leaders in the category pay dependable, recurring dividends each quarter, regardless of the state of the economy. Our $100,000 blue-chip value portfolio ... Our $100,000 Blue-Chip Value Portfolio Pays $6,500 per Year and Offers Boomers Big Passive Income
